Gethu Thaen Kaatru Song Lyrics
Singers : Haricharan, Shashaa Tirupati
Lyrics : Thamarai

unnai ennai
theenda thaaney
vandhadhu.
adhu ennai
mattum yeno
theendi chendradhu.

indha orunaal varumaa
illai odindhae vizhuma
ena palanaal palanaal
paadhikkanaavil
ezhundhen thaguma

naan paniyaa paniyaa
nee veyilin thuliyaa
naan karaiyum karaiyum
varai nee
varai nee
vaagai thodavaa

un
kanaga kanaga manam
ulaga ulaga ganam
edayida mudiyadhu
ingu naan unadhenil
aaganum enil
mudhugil kodhu

un
azhagu azhagu mugam
pazhaga pazhaga sugam
oru thuli thigattaadhu
un anbenum gunam
aayiram varam
nigarum yedhu

iruvarum nadandhaal
tharayinil iru kaal
sumappadhu nee allavaa

unnai mattum
theendi poga
vandhadhu.
adhu ennai
mattum yeno
theendi chendradhu.

naan
aliyum alayum kalai
karayai adaivadhillai
kadalilum idamillai
oru kadhalan nilai
maberum alai
mudive illai

naan
pozhiyum pozhiyum mazhai
perugum pozhudhu pizhai
thirumbida vazhiyillai
oru kadhali nilai
mazhaiyenum kalai
vilaiyaattillai

indha orunaal varumaa
illai odindhae vizhuma
ena palanaal palanaal
paadhikkanaavil
ezhundhen thaguma

naan paniyaa paniyaa
nee veyilin thuliyaa
naan karaiyum karaiyum
varai nee
varai nee
vaagai thodavaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thaen Kaatru'?

'Thaen Kaatru' conveys the sweetness of love and the emotions that come with it, as expressed through its beautiful lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Gethu'?

In Gethu, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Thaen Kaatru'?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Thaen Kaatru' released?

'Thaen Kaatru' was released on December 31, 2015, as part of the movie Gethu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaen Kaatru, the song encapsulates the tender emotions of love, portraying a deep connection between the characters in Gethu. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect romantic anthem. As the singers harmonize beautifully, listeners are transported into a world of love and longing. This track not only enhances the narrative of the film but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaen Kaatru from Gethu is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai and captivating music by Harrish Jeyaraj. Dive into the soothing melodies that make this track a must-listen for all romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: The sweet breeze has come and embraced me.
You are the one who has come to me. It seems like only I am being drawn to you.
The sweet breeze has come and embraced me.
Only you have come to draw me away.
It seems like only I am being drawn to you.
Today, will it come or not? I have risen from my sleep due to various reasons.
I am the worker, you are the shadow of the sun. I will come to you, you will come to me, let’s not separate.
The sweet breeze has come and embraced me.
You are the one who has come to me.
It seems like only I am being drawn to you.
Your eyes, your heart, the world’s music cannot be captured here. I must be in you, but the clouds must give way.
Your beauty, your face, brings comfort. A drop of rain cannot be captured, your qualities are a thousand blessings.
When both walk together, it feels like two feet are in harmony, isn’t it you?
hey..
The sweet breeze has come and embraced me.
Only you have come to draw me away. It seems like only I am being drawn to you.
I cannot hide my love, there is no place in the sea. A lover's state has no end.
When I pour, the rain increases, but there is no way to turn back the mistakes. A lover's state does not play like rain.
You are the lamp in my life, I am the spark.
Oh, the sweet breeze has come and embraced me.
You are the one who has come to me.
It seems like only I am being drawn to you.
Today, will it come or not? I have risen from my sleep due to various reasons.
I am the worker, you are the shadow of the sun. I will come to you, you will come to me, let’s not separate.
